narrative:
Lagrange Township has 4,488 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
